person.name: Neha Gupta
person.title: Backend Developer
person.tagline: I design APIs and data systems that stay fast and correct under load.

sections.headline: Reliable APIs and data systems
sections.description: Backend developer focused on well-designed APIs, solid data modelling, and services that stay correct and fast as they scale.

sections.heading: About me
paragraphs: I'm a backend developer who enjoys the hard parts — data modelling, concurrency, queues, and keeping latency low while traffic grows.
I write clear, well-tested services and care about observability so problems are easy to find and fix.
credentials: Strong in SQL, schema design and query tuning

items.title: APIs
items.desc: REST, GraphQL, gRPC, API design & versioning.

items.title: Data
items.desc: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, indexing & tuning.

items.title: Infra
items.desc: Docker, Kubernetes basics, AWS, CI/CD, monitoring.

items.title: Payments Service
items.desc: Idempotent payments API (Node, PostgreSQL); processed ₹10Cr+ with zero double-charges.

items.title: Search & Indexing
items.desc: Rebuilt product search on Elasticsearch; p95 latency 800ms → 120ms.

items.title: Event Pipeline
items.desc: Kafka-based pipeline feeding analytics and notifications at 5M events/day.

sections.heading: Where I've worked
body: Backend Engineer, FintechCo (2023–present) — payments and ledger services.
Software Engineer, CommerceX (2022–2023) — catalog and search APIs.

sections.heading: Let's build solid systems
